plan.annotation: Reading left to right: source record (journey-receipt) → extracted fact (elapsed 52s, status complete) → bounded claim (human acceptance at 52 seconds) → slide element → exported receipt. A separate branch marks 'zero errors' as rejected: no browser-error evidence is present in the source.

operations.label: Lineage chain
operations.value: Source record → extracted fact → bounded claim → slide element → exported receipt

operations.label: Bound claim
operations.value: human acceptance at 52 seconds — bound to source journey-receipt

operations.label: Rejected branch
operations.value: 'zero errors' rejected — unsupported; no browser-error evidence is present

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint, the lineage renders as editable nodes and connectors preserving the left-to-right chain, the bound source ID journey-receipt, and the rejected 'zero errors' branch as a distinct editable node; the lineage is never flattened into prose.
plan.takeaway: The measured claim 'human acceptance at 52 seconds' traces directly to source journey-receipt; the unsupported 'zero errors' claim is rejected.
plan.title: Evidence Lineage: Human Acceptance at 52 Seconds
